title: Décor Double Wall Stainless Steel Travel Mug - Keeps 4 Hours Hot - 12 Hours Cold - Car Cup Holder Compatible - Removable Screw Top Lid - 300ml White.
features: Up to 4 Hours Hot - Drink your coffee or tea on go with Décor’s 300ml travel flask with stylish gloss finish
Up to 12 Hours Cold - Not just for hot drinks, Décor's Insulated Double Walled Flask keeps cold drinks cool for up to 12 hours
Leakproof Seal - Featuring a screw top lid and food grade silicone seal to prevent leaks which makes this flask perfect for carrying around on a busy day
Cost-Saving & Eco-Friendly - Help save the planet and avoid single-use coffee cups with Décor's reusable travel flasks
Reusable & Durable - Décor have been making lives easier for over 60 years with homewares that are functional, affordable and made to last
